title: Common Helm applies Atk and AL plus two while equipped

plan.title: Common Helm applies Atk and AL plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Common Helm to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify AL gains +2, and run a battle to verify Atk gains +2.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Atk bonus comes only from Common Helm.

steps: Player 1 plays Common Helm and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Common Helm remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective stat output for AL and battle damage output for Atk.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Common Helm Atk/AL equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
